title: 403 Forbidden error when accessing SharePoint
symptom: When trying to connect to SharePoint to read/write files, a 403 Forbidden error occurs in the dropdowns for site ID, folder ID, and file ID.
not_this_if: No error occurs in cloud trial account
root_cause: The 403 Forbidden error indicates that the application does not have sufficient permissions to access the SharePoint resources. This can happen if required permissions are missing from the Azure application registration.
fix_steps: Open your Azure application registration settings
Retry connecting to SharePoint in n8n
agent_instruction: Add 'Directory.Read.All' and 'Sites.Read.All' permissions to your Azure app registration.
